title: AdoSyncLedger
description: Schema for the ADO sync ledger tracking active mappings between GitHub issues and Azure DevOps work items. Stored at .governance/state/ado-sync-ledger.json.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this ledger schema.

mappings.description: Array of active GitHub-to-ADO work item mappings.

ado_project.description: ADO project name containing the work item.

ado_work_item_url.description: Direct URL to the ADO work item.

sync_direction.description: Direction of the last sync operation for this mapping.

last_synced_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent successful sync.

last_sync_source.description: Which system originated the most recent change that was synced.

last_sync_fields.description: List of field names that were updated in the most recent sync (e.g., ['title', 'state', 'assignee']).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this mapping was first created.

sync_status.description: Current status of this mapping. 'active' means sync is operational, 'paused' means sync is temporarily halted, 'error' means the last sync failed.
